chunks.title: David's Old Age and Abishag
chunks.reason: Describes King David's physical decline and the search for a nurse to keep him warm.

chunks.title: Adonijah's Usurpation Attempt
chunks.reason: Details Adonijah's self-coronation preparations and the key figures who supported or opposed him.

chunks.title: Nathan and Bathsheba's Counsel
chunks.reason: A strategic conversation between Nathan and Bathsheba to remind David of his oath before Solomon is crowned.

chunks.title: David's Decree for Solomon
chunks.reason: King David confirms his oath to Bathsheba and issues orders to Zadok, Nathan, and Benaiah.

chunks.title: Solomon's Anointing at Gihon
chunks.reason: The execution of David's command to anoint Solomon and the public celebration.

chunks.title: Adonijah's Reaction and Flight
chunks.reason: The feast guests hear the news, Adonijah learns of Solomon's coronation, and flees to the altar.

chunks.title: Solomon's Judgment on Adonijah
chunks.reason: Adonijah seeks mercy at the altar and Solomon grants him temporary safety with a warning.
